sourceMovie.title: Scary Movie 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Scary Movie 2 (2001) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Keenen Ivory Wayans's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Beetlejuice
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Scary Movie 2 clicked for you, Beetlejuice (1988) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Scary Movie 2?
faq.answer: Try Beetlejuice, Scary Movie, This Is the End—each shares DNA with Scary Movie 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Scary Movie 2?
faq.answer: Scary Movie 2 (2001) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Scary Movie 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Scary Movie Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
